tools.note: The handler requires explicit customer eligibility values and non-empty territory pricing, validates paid/free pricing rules, and enforces that autoRenewEnabled=false is limited to FREE_TRIAL offers that replace introductory offers.
Creates one subscription price. Apple 4.4 adds planType and preserveCurrentPrice; the public surface cannot express them, so mapping remains partial.

fields.localRole: Optional IntegerRange minimum encoded independently without inventing a maximum.
Optional IntegerRange maximum encoded independently without inventing a minimum.
Optional compatibility labels validated one-to-one against price_point_ids; not sent because each subscription price point ID already identifies its territory.
Creates inline winBackOfferPrices resources containing only the subscriptionPricePoint relationship shown in Apple's official create example.

tools.note: Apple API 4.4.1 requires the prices relationship, and Apple's official create example identifies availability through subscription price point IDs. The handler sends non-empty inline resources containing subscriptionPricePoint only, treats territory_ids as optional local compatibility metadata, and preserves independently optional IntegerRange bounds.

fields.localRole: Accepts Apple's supported month values or explicit null to clear the attribute; omission leaves it unchanged.
An integer sets only minimum without inventing maximum; explicit null clears customerEligibilityTimeSinceLastSubscribedInMonths.
An integer sets only maximum without inventing minimum; explicit null clears customerEligibilityTimeSinceLastSubscribedInMonths.
Explicit null clears the attribute; omission leaves it unchanged.

tools.note: The public tool preserves omitted-versus-null update semantics for every nullable Apple 4.4.1 attribute, accepts either IntegerRange bound independently, and rejects no-op updates before network I/O.

inputs.localRole: Use the reserved image ID returned by Apple as the commit path ID.

Use the MD5 checksum produced while uploading the local file through Apple's presigned operations.

fields.localRole: Derives fileName/fileSize for reserve, supplies binary upload bytes, and drives commit checksum.

tools.note: The current handler uses the non-deprecated product-scoped image reserve/commit operations documented by Apple 4.4.1; binary upload is external and no subscriptionVersion resolver is involved.

fields.localRole: Derives reserve metadata, supplies binary upload bytes, and drives the commit checksum.

tools.note: Reserve and commit are Apple operations; binary transfer to the returned upload URL is a local/external step.
